symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral intense ocular itch with watery discharge

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Itch-predominant bilateral watery eyes are the hallmark of allergic conjunctivitis.
Watery not purulent, itch not matting — argues against bacterial.

symptoms.symptom_name: Concurrent sneezing and rhinorrhoea after aeroallergen exposure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Allergic rhinoconjunctivitis pattern after allergen exposure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Preserved vision, no deep pain/photophobia/pain on eye movement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painless, normal vision and eye movements argue strongly against orbital cellulitis/keratitis/uveitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chemosis and tarsal papillae on eversion (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chemosis and papillary reaction support allergic cause but require examination.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Clinical diagnosis; allergy testing only if chronic/recurrent and trigger unclear.
